title: pelargonium peltatum
intro: Pelargonium peltatum, also known as the roofed pelargonium or hanging pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium peltatum include relief from digestive issues, colds, and fever, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium peltatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
